title: juno regis-uzziae
intro: Juno regis-uzziae, also known as Juniperus oxycedrus, is a species of evergreen tree native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is rich in terpenes, particularly pinene, which contribute to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. Juno regis-uzziae has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as bronchitis, digestive problems, and skin conditions, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote detoxification. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or tincture, which are often used in herbal medicine to support respiratory health, reduce stress, and improve overall well-being.
